titleStmt.title: SII 7.298: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 298. (A.R. No. 111 of 1901). ON THE THIRD SLAB IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The foregoing portion of this inscription is missing.kkaṁ baha teru kāṭe gadyāṇa yippattayēḷu hoṁnnu .
ru haṇa . baṁniṁja Adivāsadalu Ā Ūravara sa
mucāyada Appaṇeyaṁ modalu muru haṇakā
ra yeraḍu kramadhārekkaḷa śattiAkkaḷa Appaṇeya modalu Ā
ru hoṁnu Aruhaṇa tāra hadinālku Ubhaya baṁniṁ
ja Adhivasadali yareḍu hoṁnnu yippaṇavige baha
kāṭe gadyāṇa nālvattaAyidu Ubhayaṁ śivaḷiya grā
madiṁda Adhivāsa yeraḍakkaṁ modalu kāṭe gadyāṇa Ayidu
hoṁnnu tāra yeraḍakkaṁ baha teru gadyāṇa yeppattayera
ḍu hoṁnnu Aruhaṇa . paḍuvabhage koṭa Ura Adhivāsadalli
ṁ teṁkaṇa karkaṭakavana Appaṇeya modalu kāṭe gadyāṇava
ruhaṇa tāra Aru tumakārakkaḷa Appaṇamaṁ nālkuhaṇaU tārayāhattuUbha
yaṁ paḍuvabhāgeyalu kāṭe gadyāṇavoṁdakaṁ baha teru gadyāṇa
yippattēḷu hoṁnu yippaṇa Aṁttu śivaḷiya paḍuva bāgeyaṁ
teruva terinalu pratamōtkaruṣeya vidyāmōda tīrthaśrīpādaṁgaḷu
modalāda Eṁṭu Utkaruṣeyaru Ārādhisuvaṁthā Uḍupina
śrīkruṣṇadēvara naṁdādīptige sarvamānyavāgi koṭadu bārkūra kāṭe gadyā
ṇa hoṁnu 100 Akṣaradalu hoṁnu nūru . yi hoṁninavoḷage
Uḍupina mahādēvarige voṁdu naṁdādīvigeyanu naḍeyisi ba
hadu . yi hoṁna teruva bāḷige catussīmevoḷaguḷa nidhinikṣē
pajalapāṣāṇaAkṣiṇiĀgami(si)siddhasādhya Aṣṭabhōgatējasāmya
sahitavāgi sarvvamānyavāgi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyīyāgi naḍeyi
si bahadu yeṁdu rāyaru māḍida dharmakke barasida silāśāsa
na . yi dharmakke Ārobbaru tappabāradu tappidavarige vāraṇā
siyali Ayinūrayeṁṭu kapile koṁda dōṣadalli hōha
ru . svadataṁ paradattaṁ vā braṁhma Utti harēta yaḥ . śaṣṭi varuṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kramiḥ . dānapālanayō
rmadhyē pālanaṁ śraya Ucyate . dānā tsarggamāpnōti pālanā
dacyutaṁ padaṁ . śrīharihararāyara kayyalu māḍida
dharmma śrīvīraharihararāyara vopu śrīvirupakṣadēvaru
śivaḷiya mūdillavaru niḍuṁbūra grāmada voppu
Uḍupina śrīmahādēvaru saguriya kuṁjatavana na
ḍuvaṁti Anavarata dēvaḷiyadēvaru baṁniṁjada Adhivāsa
da jananigaḷa voppu tāḷakuḍedēvaru koḍaUra jananigaḷa vo
ppu kānaḍa śaṁkranārāyaṇadēvara voppu maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.298 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
